reference_answer: The app crashes when users try to log in, preventing access.
The app experiences slow performance and lag on older devices, affecting usability.
Users report UI glitches and misaligned elements when using the app in dark mode.
The app frequently crashes when users attempt to play videos, disrupting the experience.
Users are unable to save their settings, leading to frustration and repeated configuration.
Users report that they are not receiving notifications from the app, missing important updates.
The app freezes and becomes unresponsive when users try to start it, preventing access.
Users experience significant battery drain when using the app, reducing device longevity.
The app is incompatible with the latest OS version, causing crashes and functionality issues.
Users encounter issues with in-app purchases, such as failed transactions and missing items.
